name: ghostscript-doc
title: ghostscript-doc
summary: interpreter for the PostScript language and for PDF - Documentation
description:
interpreter for the PostScript language and for PDF - Documentation
GPL Ghostscript is used for PostScript/PDF preview and printing.
Usually as a back-end to a program such as ghostview,
it can display PostScript and PDF documents in an X11 environment.
.
This package contains documentation for GPL Ghostscript,
mainly targeted developers and advanced users.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ghostscript-doc because interpreter for the PostScript language and for PDF - Documentation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ghostscript-doc as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ghostscript-doc with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ghostscript-doc --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
